<desc><s>It's a blue plastic keycard with the word "HALL" emblazoned on it.</s> <s>Could this unlock the HALL DOOR?</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh head of lettuce.</s> <if cond="this.uses !== 3"><s>Someone has eaten or cut away some of its leaves.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>This is a ripe, fresh tomato, an ingredient in many dishes.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="bass">bass</poss></procedural> about ten inches in length with green scales.</s> <s>It hasn't been cleaned yet.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="walleye">walleye</poss></procedural> with greenish scales.</s> <s>It's thickset and about 14 inches long.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a head of green cabbage.</s> <if cond="this.uses !== 3"><s>Someone has eaten or cut away some of its leaves.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>This is a medium-hot chili pepper, picked ripe and fresh.</s> <s>It's red-orange in color.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a chive, a clove related to both onions and garlic.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh onion.</s> <s>It's a common ingredient in cooking that's famous for making folks cry.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="perch">perch</poss></procedural> with yellowish scales.</s> <s>It's about 8 inches in length.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="salmon">salmon</poss></procedural>, still covered in silver scales.</s> <s>It's about 14 inches in length.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is an eggplant, otherwise known as an aubergine.</s> <s>It's large and purple with a commanding presence for a vegetable.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh leaf from a basil plant.</s> <s>When dried and crushed, it's a common herb in cooking.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a head of cauliflower.</s> <s>It looks nice and fresh.</s> <if cond="this.uses !== 3"><s>Someone has eaten or cut away some of it.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="tilapia">tilapia</poss></procedural>, about 10 inches in length.</s> <s>It's silvery in color with stripes over its back.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is a rather slimy raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="catfish">catfish</poss></procedural> with a brown tint to it.</s> <s>It's about a foot long and has bulging eyes on either side of its head.</s></desc>

This is a raw shrimp, pinkish-gray in color. It's still in its shell.

> Tip: You can remove it from its shell with the `.uncraft` command!
<desc><s>This is a pod of soybeans, a staple in diets around the world.</s> <s>You probably shouldn't eat them like this though.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh cucumber.</s> <if cond="this.uses !== 2"><s>Only half of it remains.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>This is a raw <procedural name="fish"><poss name="trout">trout</poss></procedural>, about a foot long.</s> <s>It hasn't been cleaned yet and still has its yellow-green scales and bulging, dead eyes.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a single large, fresh strawberry.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a small, white ping pong ball.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a standard red ping pong paddle.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a plastic dart box with a clear window on the top of the case, allowing you to see what's inside.</s> <s>It opens up easily.</s> <s>In it, you find <il></il>.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a small dart with a soft aluminum tip.</s> <s>You definitely couldn't do any damage with this.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It’s the classic board game Clue!</s> <s>Your objective as you play is to uncover who the killer is and how they committed the murder.</s> <s>You assume the role of one of six suspects and move around the board to collect clues.</s> <s>If you’re the killer, make sure to hide your tracks!</s></desc>

<desc><s>Originally created to decry capitalism, Monopoly has instead become representative of it.</s> <s>Oh well!</s> <s>Your objective is to move around the board obtaining various properties with the fake Monopoly money you’ve been given.</s> <s>You compete with other players, and sometimes strike deals with them, until you’re the last person left who hasn’t gone bankrupt.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is a board game meant to mimic the reality of a person going through life by attending (or not attending) college, getting married, having kids, paying off mortgages, etc.</s> <s>It’s more fun than it sounds, really.</s> <s>You spin the spinner in the middle to determine how many spaces ahead you move, and the space you land on tells you what happens to your little person in-game.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It’s a game you should never play with an architect.</s> <s>Your objective is to pull pieces out from the neatly-stacked Jenga block tower without toppling the tower.</s> <s>Whoever topples the tower is out of the game!</s></desc>

<desc><s>It’s a playmat you place down on a floor, and then you spin a wheel to determine which spaces on the playmat you have to touch with your hands or feet.</s> <s>In the process, you’ll likely be getting tangled up with other players, which totally isn’t awkward or uncomfortable at all.</s></desc>

<desc><s>In this game, you each play with a variety of ships on your end, with a wall erected in between each player so you can’t see the other player’s pieces.</s> <s>You call out various coordinates, and if you guess correctly, the other player’s ship is sunk, until there are no more pieces left.</s></desc>

<desc><s>A game that has spawned many family feuds over what qualifies as a word, Scrabble is a game where you are given a jumbled-up variety of different letters, and you attempt to make words out of them on the board in front of you.</s> <s>Each letter and block is worth a certain amount of points.</s> <s>The winner is whoever has the most points at the end!</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's Mastermind, a code-breaking game for two players.</s> <s>In this game, one player is the codemaker, who creates a pattern of four pegs chosen from six different colors, and the other player is the codebreaker, who attempts to figure out the code in a limited number of turns.</s> <s>After each guess, the codemaker places smaller pegs that provide feedback to the codebreaker.</s> <s>It's an intense puzzle game that's sure to make you feel like an absolute genius or a total idiot!</s></desc>

It's a silver cocktail shaker that has a strainer built into the top. You can use this for any cocktail that calls for it.

(Note: To make mixed drinks, `.drop` this onto the MIXING STATION, as well as the bottle or jug containing the ingredients you want, and a glass to pour the mixed drink into. Putting filled glasses will not work, unless the ingredient is only obtainable by one of the nozzles on the bar counter. When everything is in place, send `.use MIXING STATION`. If you're not sure what you can mix, hold this in your inventory and send `.recipes COCKTAIL SHAKER`!)

<desc><s>It's a bottle of generic <procedural name="wine flavor"><poss name="red wine">red wine. It's a light alcohol made from dark-colored grapes, hence its red color</poss></procedural>.</s> <if cond="this.uses > 1 && this.uses < 10"><s>The bottle is less than half full.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>There's only enough in this bottle for about one more glass.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a bottle of generic Bloody Mary mix.</s> <s>It's a non-alcoholic blend of ingredients that's orangish red in color.</s> <s>Just add vodka, and you're good to go.</s> <if cond="this.uses > 1 && this.uses < 10"><s>The bottle is less than half full.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>There's only enough in this bottle for about one more shot.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It looks like a regular spatula.</s> <s>Maybe you could flip some burgers with it.</s></desc>

<desc><s>These tongs are metal and easy enough to use.</s> <s>If you pull the tab on the bottom, they will remain stationery.</s> <s>If you push the tab back in, they become operable again.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is a like-new, white, terrycloth rag.</s> <s>It smells like it was cleaned recently.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a bottle of yellow cooking oil.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a plain bag to store salt.</s> <if cond="this.inventory.first().containsNoItems() === true"><s>It's empty.</s></if><if cond="this.inventory.first().containsNoItems() === false && this.inventory.first().items[0].prefab.id === 'SALT'"><s><if cond="this.inventory.first().items[0].quantity > 100">It's filled with plenty of salt.</if><if cond="this.inventory.first().items[0].quantity > 25 && this.inventory.first().items[0].quantity <= 100">It still has a good amount of salt, but it's less than halfway full.</if><if cond="this.inventory.first().items[0].quantity <= 25">It's almost out of salt.</if></s></if></desc>

<desc><s>This is a plastic container of edible grade gypsum powder.</s> <s>It's an ingredient in making tofu.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a plastic cylindrical container for holding ground-up <procedural name="tea flavor"><poss name="chamomile">chamomile</poss></procedural> tea leaves.</s> <s>In it, you find <il></il>.</s></desc>
RoomItem: BAG OF SALT 1/BAG OF SALT
<desc><s>This is no more than a teaspoon of granular salt.</s></desc>
RoomItem: BAG OF CHICKPEA FLOUR 1/BAG OF CHICKPEA FLOUR
<desc><s>It's around a cup of flour made from crushed chickpeas.</s></desc>
RoomItem: CONTAINER OF TEA LEAVES 1/CONTAINER OF TEA LEAVES
<desc><s>It's a teaspoon of ground-up <procedural name="tea flavor"><poss name="chamomile">chamomile</poss></procedural> tea leaves.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small kitchen mortar, for crushing and grinding ingredients.</s> <s>It's white and shaped like a small bowl.</s> <s>Despite its size, it has some weight to it.</s> <s>It contains <il></il>.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a small pestle, used to crush and grind ingredients in a mortar.</s> <s>It's white and shaped like a club.</s> <s>Despite its size, it has some weight to it.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a clean, glass cup intended to attach to the top of a blender.</s> <s>You can't blend anything without this.</s> <s>It currently contains <il></il>.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is baked eggplant topped with a dairy substitute.</s> <s>It's served on <procedural name="base color"><poss name="default">a plain, white</poss></procedural><procedural name="quality"><poss name="default"/></procedural> plate.</s></desc>

This is a raw shrimp, pinkish-gray in color. It's still in its shell.

> Tip: You can remove it from its shell with the `.uncraft` command!
<desc><s>This is a raw, boneless filet of <procedural name="fish"><poss name="salmon">salmon</poss></procedural>.</s></desc>
<desc><s>These are bite-sized squares of firm tofu.</s> <s>They're edible, but they're plain and uncooked, so they won't taste very good.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a ripe, fresh tomato, an ingredient in many dishes.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is an eggplant, otherwise known as an aubergine.</s> <s>It's large and purple with a commanding presence for a vegetable.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh onion.</s> <s>It's a common ingredient in cooking that's famous for making folks cry.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a fresh head of lettuce.</s> <if cond="this.uses !== 3"><s>Someone has eaten or cut away some of its leaves.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>This is a pink chef's apron.</s> <s>The upper strap goes over your head, and you tie the lower one behind your back.</s> <s>"Please do nothing to the cook" is written on the front.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a standard plastic broom with synthetic bristles that won’t come off too easily.</s> <s>It's perfect for cleaning up a mess.</s> </desc>
<desc><s>If you sweep something, you’ll need this to get the mess off the floor.</s> <s>You can roll this one around, and tip it upwards when the mess has been contained.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a bottle of detergent that you could use to wash dishes.</s> <if cond="this.uses < 5"><s>The bottle is less than half full.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>This is an incredibly soft pillow in a white pillowcase.</s> <s>You'd easily get a good night's sleep with this.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a soft, white blanket.</s> <s>It's not very thick, but it will at least keep you a little warm.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is an incredibly soft pillow in a white pillowcase.</s> <s>You'd easily get a good night's sleep with this.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a soft, white blanket.</s> <s>It's not very thick, but it will at least keep you a little warm.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is an incredibly soft pillow in a white pillowcase.</s> <s>You'd easily get a good night's sleep with this.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a soft, white blanket.</s> <s>It's not very thick, but it will at least keep you a little warm.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a stainless steel bedpan.</s> <s>Bedridden patients are intended to use it as a toilet.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an AED, or Automated External Defibrillator<if cond="player.perception > 4">, a medical device that can monitor a person's heart rate and, if necessary, deliver an electric shock to initiate a regular heartbeat</if>.</s> <s>It's supposed to be easy to use, although you do need training to learn how to do it properly.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small, extremely sharp bladed instrument used to make precise cuts in surgeries and dissections.</s> <s>You could do some serious damage with this, and it's easy enough to hide.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small, metallic instrument with a sharp, flat head, almost like a flat head screwdriver.</s> <if cond="player.perception > 6"><s>This is a surgical instrument used to remove or reshape bone.</s> <s>It's typically used in dental procedures, but it can be used in a variety of operations.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small, metallic instrument with two sharp points on opposing "pincers" of sorts.</s> <s>You can push the "pincers" together by squeezing with your thumb and index finger.</s> <if cond="player.perception > 6"><s>This is a surgical instrument used to grasp, hold, and manipulate body tissue.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small, metallic instrument with plastic grips.</s> <s>It resembles a pair of scissors, except the blades have an unusual shape.</s> <if cond="player.perception > 6"><s>This is a medical instrument used to quickly cut clothing from injured people.</s> <s>They're not supposed to be used on a person's internal organs.</s> <s>Their rugged construction allows them to cut through strong materials like car seatbelts, leather, and denim -- they can even cut through thin metals and other hard surfaces.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>It's a pair of metal surgical scissors.</s> <s>They're just like regular scissors, except the blades are much sharper.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a green box of extra large, latex-free vinyl gloves.</s> <s>In it are <il></il>.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>Or at least it's supposed to be, but it's empty.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>It's a blue box of medical masks.</s> <s>In it are <il></il>.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>Or at least it's supposed to be, but it's empty.</s></if></desc>
RoomItem: VINYL GLOVE BOX 1/VINYL GLOVE BOX
<desc><s>It's a pair of disposable vinyl gloves.</s> <s>These would be perfect for keeping blood off your hands.</s></desc>
RoomItem: MEDICAL MASK BOX 1/MEDICAL MASK BOX
<desc><s>It's a disposable blue medical mask.</s> <s>It's meant to prevent the spread of airborne diseases.</s> <s>It wouldn't do much good at disguising your face, unfortunately.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a turquoise patient gown that comes down to the knees.</s> <s>It's very baggy.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a plain white pair of panties.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a gray pair of basic boxers.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a pair of gray socks that have protective grip on the sole.</s> <s>You're much less likely to slip on slick tile used in medical facilities when you wear these.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a gray pair of slippers.</s> <s>They're surprisingly soft.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a set of teal medical scrubs.</s> <s>It includes a short-sleeved shirt and loose-fitting pants.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a medical stethoscope.</s> <s>You can use this to listen to a patient's heartbeat.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is a digital thermometer meant to take a person's temperature.</s> <s>The best way to get an accurate reading is to hold it under your tongue.</s> <s>It gives readings in degrees Fahrenheit and Celsius.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a bottle of peroxide.</s> <s>You can use this to clean cuts and scrapes to avoid and cure infections.</s></desc>

<desc><s>This is a fully-equipped first aid kit.</s> <s>It comes with all the fixings to treat minor and some moderate injuries, like bandaids, gauze, scissors, tape, and even burn relief gel.</s> <s>This could be very useful.</s> <s>In it, you find <il></il>.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT
<desc><s>This is a box of adhesive bandages.</s> <s>In it, you find <il></il>.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT
<desc><s>This is a small tube of antibiotic cream.</s> <s>This will help prevent infection of small wounds and provide some pain relief.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT
<desc><s>This is a roll of white gauze.</s> <s>This would be useful for bandaging larger wounds.</s> <s>Or absorbing blood for a murder, your choice.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT
<desc><s>This is a roll of white medical tape.</s> <s>It's used for keeping gauze and other medical dressings in place.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT
<desc><s>This is a small, white sanitary wipe.</s> <s>You can use this to wipe off a recently-made wound to help prevent infection.</s></desc>
RoomItem: FIRST AID KIT/FIRST AID KIT

<desc><s>It's a bottle of activated charcoal pills.</s> <s>The label reads: "ONLY CONSUME IN CASES OF POISONING. WILL INDUCE VOMITING. CAN DECREASE EFFECTIVENESS OF OTHER DRUGS".</s> <s>In it, you find <il></il>.</s></desc>
<desc><s>This is a tan-colored adhesive bandage.</s> <s>You can use it to cover up minor scratches and injuries to prevent them from getting infected.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a large, circular black pill.</s> <s>It has a line running down the middle on both sides.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an opaque bottle of liquid with a blue cap.</s> <s>If you unscrew the cap, you'll find it's topped with a rubber stopper, used to help fill a syringe.</s> <s>The label on the front reads: `Estradiol Valerate: 5mL Sterile Multiple Dose Vial. 200mg/5mL. Injection USP. Intramuscular Use Only.`</s> <if cond="player.hasStatus('transfem')"><s>You're supposed to give yourself an injection of this every week.</s></if> <s>It has about <var v="this.uses" /> dose<if cond="this.uses > 1">s</if> left.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an opaque bottle of liquid with a blue cap.</s> <s>If you unscrew the cap, you'll find it's topped with a rubber stopper, used to help fill a syringe.</s> <s>The label on the front reads: `Testosterone: 10ml Sterile Multiple Dose Vial. 200mg/mL. Injection USP. Intramuscular Use Only.`</s> <if cond="player.hasStatus('transmasc')"><s>You're supposed to give yourself an injection of this every week.</s></if> <s>It has about <var v="this.uses" /> dose<if cond="this.uses > 1">s</if> left.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a white pill bottle with a red label indicating that it contains Paliperidone, a medication that treats schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorder.</s> <s>It says to take it with water.</s> <s>You find <il></il> inside of it.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>It's empty.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's an orange pill bottle with a label indicating that it contains Vicodin, a powerful painkiller.</s> <s>The part of the label containing the dosage has been torn off, but there's a warning saying to only take one pill a day because it's an addictive substance.</s> <s>There are <il></il> inside.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>It's empty.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>This is a bottle of colorful, chewable antacids.</s> <s>These are supposed to help quell stomachaches.</s> <s>They seem to only come in the orange flavor.</s> <s>The directions say to take two and wait half an hour.</s> <s>In it, you see <il></il>.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a wide, orange pill bottle with a label indicating it contains potassium cyanide, a deadly poison.</s> <s>The dosage is 500mg.</s> <s>Just one pill of this is sure to kill someone, and quickly, too.</s> <s>Listed symptoms include difficulty breathing, seizures, violent vomiting, loss of consciousness, and possible cardiac arrest.</s> <s>Inside the bottle is <il></il>.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>The bottle is empty.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>You examine the bottle of laxatives.</s> <s>It comes in a powder form to be poured into food or drink for consumption.</s> <s>The bottle warns of flatulence and diarrhea as possible side effects.</s> <if cond="this.uses === 2"><s>The bottle is sealed.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>The bottle is only half full.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>You examine the bottle of Nemutussin.</s> <s>It's a purple bottle containing purple liquid, which is supposedly grape-flavored.</s> <s>The bottle describes it as a sleep aid made from the sap of a nemu tree.</s> <s>It's a very high dosage, too.</s> <if cond="this.uses === 3"><s>The bottle is sealed.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 2"><s>The bottle is about two-thirds full.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>The bottle is only about one-third full.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's an orange pill bottle with a label indicating that it contains Adderall, an ADHD medication.</s> <s>The part of the label containing the dosage has been torn off, but there's a warning saying to only take one pill a day because it's a powerful stimulant.</s> <s>There are <il></il> inside.</s> <if cond="this.containsNoItems()"><s>It's empty.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's an opaque bottle of liquid with a white cap.</s> <s>If you unscrew the cap, you'll find it's topped with a rubber stopper, used to help fill a syringe.</s> <s>The label on the front reads: `Midazolam: Sedative Injection.`</s> <s>Here the dosage is scratched out.</s> <s>`For I.M. and I.V. use only. Warning: Can cause paranoid or suicidal ideation and impair memory, judgment, and coordination. Combining with other substances, particularly alcohol, can slow breathing and possibly lead to death.`</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an opaque bottle of liquid with a white cap.</s> <s>If you unscrew the cap, you'll find it's topped with a rubber stopper, used to help fill a syringe.</s> <s>The label on the front reads: `Potassium Chloride: Potassium Supplement Injection.`</s> <s>Here the dosage is scratched out.</s> <s>`For I.M. and I.V. use only. Warning: Use only as directed. If more than the prescribed dosage is used, contact poison control immediately. Combining this with other substances, particularly alcohol, can slow breathing and possibly lead to death.`</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an opaque bottle of liquid with a white cap.</s> <s>If you unscrew the cap, you'll find it's topped with a rubber stopper, used to help fill a syringe.</s> <s>The label on the front reads: `Pavulon (Pancuronium bromide): Aminosteroid Muscular Relaxant.`</s> <s>Here the dosage is scratched out.</s> <s>`For I.M. and I.V. use only. Not authorized for use in euthanasia. Relaxant and anesthetic with paralytic properties. This product is intended primarily for use in surgical settings. Warning: using more than the directed dosage can lead to respiratory failure and death. If more than the directed dosage is used, contact poison control immediately.`</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a small, red, oval-shaped tablet.</s> <s>It says "PAL 12" on one side of it.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a white, oval-shaped pill with a thin line running down the middle.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a pale orange, circular, chewable tablet.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a white, oval-shaped pill with no markings.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's an orange capsule filled with little salts.</s> <s>"G456" is printed on the capsule.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a plastic red container with a top that, once closed, will never open again.</s> <s>It has a slot on top to insert sharp items into, so that they won't break anything.</s> <s>(Note: Although there is nothing stopping you from removing something from this, please don't.)</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a very tiny key.</s> <s>What could this unlock?</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a 1-gallon jug of distilled water.</s> <s>This is water that's been chemically purified so that there are no additives in it.</s> <s>This is perfect for chemistry experiments or any number of other things.</s> <if cond="this.uses < 5 && this.uses > 1"><s>Less than half of it is left.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>There's only a little bit left.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small glass bottle with a blue cap.</s> <s>It's partially filled with a white powdery substance.</s> <s>The label says "Phosphorus pentoxide: P₄O₁₀".</s> <s>There's no other information given.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small glass bottle with a red cap.</s> <s>It's partially filled with a white powdery substance.</s> <s>The label says "Acetamide: CH₃CONH₂".</s> <s>There's no other information given.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a glass beaker, a cylindrical container with a flat bottom and a spout which makes it useful for transferring liquids to another container.</s> <s>It has markings on the side allowing you to measure the volume of the liquid inside.</s> <s>These markings stop at 500 milliliters.</s> <s>Since it's glass, you should be careful not to break it.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a glass Erlenmeyer flask, a flask with a flat bottom, a conical body, and a cylindrical neck.</s> <s>Its shape makes it useful for carrying out chemical reactions, as it's very difficult to spill.</s> <s>It has markings on the side allowing you to measure the volume of the liquid inside.</s> <s>These markings stop at 1000 milliliters.</s> <s>Since it's glass, you should be careful not to break it.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a small, translucent piece of plastic with a deep bottom and a rim on the top.</s> <if cond="player.intelligence > 4"><s>It can be used to hold something that you want to measure on a scale.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's an electric Bunsen burner.</s> <s>It has a long electrical plug attached to it.</s> <s>If you plugged this in, you could use it to carry out chemistry experiments with a flame.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a tall metal rod attached to a stand.</s> <if cond="player.intelligence > 4"><s>This is used to support pieces of chemistry equipment by attaching various pieces to it.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a metal ring with a clamp on one end that you can fasten to something else.</s> <if cond="player.intelligence > 4"><s>You can fasten it to a ring stand and then place a flask on top of it.</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>You examine the screwdriver.</s> <s>It looks to be a fairly standard Phillips screwdriver that you could use on most screws.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You examine the hammer.</s> <s>It looks to be a fairly standard hammer for pounding in nails.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You examine the wrench.</s> <s>It looks to be a fairly standard wrench for turning nuts and bolts.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You examine the pliers.</s> <s>They're fairly small with rubber grips.</s> <s>These are used to hold objects in place firmly.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You examine the box cutter.</s> <s>It's a fairly simple tool with a retractable blade for opening boxes.</s> <s>You could probably also use it as a weapon, though.</s></desc>

<desc><s>You examine the measuring tape.</s> <s>It's a retractable tape with markings measuring meters and centimeters or feet and inches.</s> <s>It can measure up to 3 meters or 10 feet.</s> <s>There's a switch to prevent the tape from coiling back inside.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a Nintendo Switch, a handheld gaming console.</s> <s>It has the standard gray JoyCons, and it even comes with a charger.</s> <s>It looks to be fairly old, but still in decent condition.</s> <s>It has a vast collection of games stored digitally, including such classics as *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*, *Fire Emblem: Three Houses*, *Mario Kart 8 Deluxe*, *Paper Mario: The Origami King*, *Pokémon Sword*, *Super Mario Odyssey*, *Super Smash Bros. Ultimate*, and many more.</s> <s>Talk about a blast from the past!</s></desc>

You examine the cell phone. It's a Samsung Galaxy S45, the latest model. It has all of the latest features, including holographic display, graphene circuitry, RealD graphics, and more. It's even connected to a Wi-Fi network! Sadly, it only seems to connect to a local network, and most of the apps have been deleted, aside from the texting app.

The texting app itself is very strange. You have to enter a recipient with every message you send, and the recipient must be the name of someone here with you. But if that person doesn't have a cell phone of their own, it won't work. Huh. How does *that* work? Still, this should at least be useful for communicating from a distance.

-# (Note: To use the cell phone, send `.equip cell phone`. While the cell phone is equipped, you will be able to use the `.text` command to text anyone else who has a cell phone equipped.)

<desc><s>It's a TI-84 Plus CE, a high-tech graphing calculator with a back-lit screen.</s> <s>You can solve almost any math problem with this if you know what you’re doing.</s> <s>You can even write simple programs on it with the built-in programming tool.</s> <if cond="player.perception > 5"><s>There are a few saved: one to add two vectors together, one to factor a polynomial, one to convert numbers into binary and vice versa, one to draw a pie chart given a list of percentages, one to simplify a radical expression, and a few others that you're not quite sure about.</s></if><if cond="player.perception <= 5"><s>There are a few saved, but you're really not sure what any of them do.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>You examine the 3.57-liter bottle of bleach.</s> <s>Its intended use is as a cleaning agent.</s> <s>The bottle advertises that it kills 99.9% of germs.</s> <s>It also warns that it's corrosive; it can cause irreversible eye damage and skin burns, and that it's harmful if swallowed.</s> <if cond="this.uses === 4"><s>The bottle is full.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 3"><s>The bottle is three-quarters full.</s></if> <if cond="this.uses === 2"><s>The bottle is only half full.</s></if><if cond="this.uses === 1"><s>The bottle is only one-quarter full.</s></if></desc>

<desc><s>It's a large, thick, black comforter.</s> <s>This would certainly keep you warm -- maybe even a little too warm.</s> <s>You could probably cover most of your body if you wore it.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a square metal box held together with screws.</s> <s>There's something clanking around inside it.</s> <s>You could open it up, if you had a screwdriver.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a real magnifying glass that a detective would use!</s> <s>This would surely help you make more detailed observations.</s></desc>

It's a small handheld whiteboard. If you found a marker, you could use this to write on. There's some writing already on it in black marker:
```ACETONITRILE (CH₃CN): A colorless liquid that converts to cyanide when inhaled, ingested, or absorbed through the skin. This process is inefficient due to the slow rate at which the body metabolizes it into hydrogen cyanide (HCN), so a high dosage must be ingested to ensure death by cyanide poisoning, which can take up to 2 hours. See the following instructions:
1. Fill beaker with distilled water.
2. Pour contents of beaker into 1000-mL flask.
3. Pour acetamide (CH₃CONH₂) into a weigh boat.
4. Transfer contents of weigh boat into flask.
5. Pour phosphorus pentoxide (P₄O₁₀) into a weigh boat.
6. Transfer contents of weigh boat into flask.
7. Swirl solution in flask until both chemicals fully dissolved.
8. Attach support ring to a ring stand.
9. Place flask with solution on support ring.
10. Position ring stand next to Bunsen burner such that the flask with solution is held above the flame.
11. Heat flask gently for 5 minutes.
12. Transfer contents of flask to another container and serve to unsuspecting victim.```

<desc><s>It's a large circular board made of a dense, grainy wood.</s> <s>There are two small holes on opposite sides to secure it on top of a pottery wheel.</s> <s>This is meant to hold your wet clay sculptures as you use the pottery wheel, so that you can transport them without distorting their shape.</s> <s>It currently holds <il></il>.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's an X-Acto knife, a very small, sharp blade mounted on a pen-like handle, used for general craft projects.</s> <s>You should be careful with this.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a green stuffed monkey plushie.</s> <s>It has a very cute, happy smile.</s> <s>It's squeezably soft, but you can feel something hard inside.</s> <if cond="player.perception > 4"><s>To get what's inside, you'd have to cut it open somehow...</s> <s>Do you dare?</s></if></desc>
<desc><s>It's a regular disposable lighter.</s> <s>It's white in color.</s> <s>You could use this to light a candle, a cigarette, or whatever else you may need to set on fire...</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a pack of sticks of chalk.</s> <s>Each stick is a different color.</s> <s>Most of them seem to be a little used.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a black eraser, the kind you would use to erase a chalkboard.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a pale mask of a smiling woman.</s> <s>It has blackened upper teeth slightly exposed between the smiling red lips, full cheeks, rectangular pupil openings, high-set eyebrows, and black hair with a white band at the center part.</s></desc>
<desc><s>It's a small orange basketball.</s> <s>It's clearly meant for kids, but at least it has a nice bounce to it.</s></desc>

It's a hi-tech tablet device with the number 0 on the back. Its screen is borderless and foldable, so you can fit it into a small space. The lock screen tells you the current time: ``.

You're able to unlock it without inputting any kind of password. It seems this device has all the standard functions you would expect in a tablet: a camera, a flashlight, Bluetooth connectivity, a note-taking app, a calculator app, and more. It's even connected to a Wi-Fi network; although there's no Internet browser, so it seems to be of limited use.

> Tip: This is an item. You can take it with the `.take` command, and then you can carry it around with you.

> Tip: Want to keep carrying this while also freeing up a hand? Try using the `.stash` command!

There's an app icon on the home screen labeled "Map". When you press it, the screen displays a map.
https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1474632211075436686/1500939300815241407/Demo_Map.png

<desc><s>In the sewing kit you find all of the basic necessities for simple projects and repairs - pins, needles, thread, and buttons.</s></desc>

<desc><s>It's a black switchblade.</s> <s>There's a button and a sliding lock that you can use to practice safety.</s> <s>When the button is pressed, a wavy, iridescent spring-loaded blade immediately pops out.</s> <s>It's pristine.</s> <s>You could use this as a weapon, or perhaps just to cut things open.</s></desc>

<desc type="ALERT"><s>The situation has become **heated**!</s> <s>Your actions will now require moderator intervention.</s></desc>
<desc type="STANDARD"><s>The situation calms down.</s> <s>Your actions no longer require moderator intervention.</s></desc>
Player has to take a break before moving to another room while stamina regenerates. When the timer reaches 0, they can move again. Automatically inflicted when a player runs out of stamina.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You have become **weary**.</s> <s>You need to take a short break before moving to another room.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You've rested long enough and are ready to move to another room.</s></desc>
Welcomes the player to Alter Ego and gives them instructions on how to play.

Welcome to Alter Ego! This demo environment has been prepared to show you all of Alter Ego's core mechanics.

What you just saw is the description of the room you're in. If you see something in ALL CAPS, there's a good chance you can examine it in more detail with the `.inspect` command. It's always a good idea to get a firm grasp on your surroundings.

You can issue commands in this DM channel, or in the channel of the room you're in. Right now, that's <#>. You can also speak in there, but speaking in this DM channel won't do anything.

Have you been using interactables? Those are the buttons and select menus that sometimes get sent to you along with descriptions. They're shortcuts for the most frequently performed actions, but there's a lot more that you can do!

To get the most out of Alter Ego, you should practice using commands. To get a list of all commands you can use, send `.help`. If you're not sure of the exact syntax to use for a command, enter the name of the command after `.help`.
Tells the player how to manage their inventory.

<desc type="PLAIN_TEXT"><if cond="findFlag('TUTORIAL', true) === true"><s>> Tip: The item you just took is now in your inventory.</s> <s>You can view your inventory at any time with the `.inventory` command.</s> <s>For more information on how it works, send `.help inventory`.</s></if></desc>

<desc type="PLAIN_TEXT"><if cond="findFlag('TUTORIAL', true) === true && player.hasStatus('minty fresh') === false"><s>> Tip: Want to brush your teeth?</s> <s>You'll need a TOOTHBRUSH and TOOTHPASTE in your hands; then, you can use the `.craft` command with them.</s></if></desc>

Same effect as asleep but develops into hungover when cured or timer hits 0. This status has a special, hard-coded narration when inflicted on a player. "[Player displayName] blacks out." Moderator's note: If this is a sandbox role play, it is recommended that a duration of 6h be given to this status.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You black out from drinking too much.</s></desc>
well rested, tired, exhausted, delirious, unconscious, blacked out
-2 to perception, -1 to dexterity and speed. Inflicts tired when timer hits 0.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You wake up feeling **hungover**.</s> <s>You have a massive headache, and your stomache churns.</s> <s>You don't remember anything that happened last night.</s></desc>
No effect. Develops into clean when timer hits 0.
No effect. Develops into stinky when timer hits 0.
Player's description will mention them being stinky. Develops into rancid when timer hits 0.
<desc><s>You have become **stinky**!</s> <s>You could use a shower.</s></desc>
<desc><s>After using the shower, you become **squeaky clean**.</s></desc>
Player's description will mention their rancid body odor.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have become simply **rancid**!</s> <s>You *desperately* need a shower!</s></desc>
<desc><s>After using the shower, you become **squeaky clean**.</s></desc>
Player's description will mention them being soaking wet.
<desc><s>You have become **soaking wet**!</s> <s>You could really use a towel right now.</s></desc>
Player's description will mention them being a little wet.
<desc><s>You are no longer soaking wet, but you are still somewhat **wet**.</s> <s>A towel would be nice.</s></desc>
Player will not become wet or soaking wet.
disable knock, disable move, disable run, disable stop, disable whisper, no channel, hear room, hidden, enable say

Player hides in or under a fixture in a room and cannot be seen by other players in the room unless they inspect that fixture. If a hidden player dies, players in the room will not be notified. A hidden player can hear all dialog in the room they're in.

You are now **hidden**. You will not be seen by other players in the room, but you will hear what they say. You are now able to use the `say` command to speak in the room, and your identity will be hidden if you choose to do so. You can also speak in the whisper channel created for your hiding spot.

> Tip: Do you want something to do while you're hidden? Try narrating your character's inner thoughts with `.monolog` command!
disable whisper, no channel, see room, hear room, concealed, enable say

Player's face is covered. They can move freely between rooms. People in each room will be notified of someone passing by wearing whatever item is covering their face, but the player in question will not be added to the room channel. A concealed player will receive all narrations that are sent to that room's channel, even from moderators. A concealed player cannot whisper, but can use the say command to speak in the room they're currently in.

<desc><s>Your face has been **concealed**.</s> <s>You will no longer be added to channels as you move between rooms, and others will see you but not recognize you.</s> <s>You are also able to use the `.say` command to speak in the room, and your identity will be concealed if you choose to do so.</s></desc>
disable all, enable help, enable status, enable time, enable gesture, enable monolog
Sets dexterity to 0, making all attacks agains this player successful. Player cannot do anything, but they can still speak, monolog, and perform certain gestures.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You have been **restricted**.</s> <s>You are unable to move.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You are no longer restricted.</s> <s>You may move freely again.</s></desc>
Player can hear voices from adjacent rooms.
Player cannot whisper and all messages this player sends in a room channel will be deleted, however messages containing commands will still be executed.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have become **mute**!</s> <s>You can no longer speak.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You are no longer mute.</s> <s>You may speak once again.</s></desc>
no sight, disable inspect, hear room, no channel, enable say, disable whisper

Player will not receive room descriptions when moving to another room and cannot use the inspect command. Player will be removed from the room channel, but can hear all messages sent by other players in the room and use the say command to talk to them. Player cannot whisper. Intended for temporary events in which areas of the game are plunged into darkness.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You are **blinded** in the total darkness as all the lights go off.</s></desc>
<desc><s>The power kicks back on, and your vision is restored.</s></desc>
disable whisper, no hearing, disable sleep, no channel, see room

Player cannot whisper and will not be added to room or whisper channels. Notifications conveying spoken dialog will not be sent to the player. They cannot sleep. Narrations that occur in the room will be sent to the player via notifications. Intended for temporary events in which extremely loud music is playing.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>The music is so loud you can hardly think.</s> <s>You have been **deafened**!</s></desc>
<desc><s>The awful music stops playing.</s> <s>You take a moment to appreciate the silence.</s></desc>
no sight, disable inspect, hear room, no channel, enable say

Same effect as blinded, but intended to be a permanent status effect. Also, player can whisper. If you intend to give this to a player permanently, it is recommended that you remove the `disable inspect` behavior attribute and write descriptions that convey information non-visually.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>Your eyesight suddenly disappears!</s> <s>You have become **blind**!</s></desc>
disable whisper, no hearing, no channel, see room, enable say
Same effect as deafened but the player can sleep, and player can use the say command. Intended to be a permanent status effect.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>Your hearing suddenly stops!</s> <s>You have become **deaf**!</s></desc>
disable move, disable run, disable craft, disable uncraft, disable knock, disable hide, disable sleep
Disables various commands. Develops into fatigued when the timer reaches 0.
<desc><s>You begin **exercising**!</s> <s>You shouldn't do this for more than an hour.</s></desc>
disable move, disable run, disable craft, disable uncraft, disable knock, disable hide, disable sleep
Disables various commands. Develops into sore when the timer reaches 0.
<desc><s>You begin **strength training**!</s> <s>You shouldn't do this for more than 30 minutes.</s></desc>
Permanent +1 to player strength. Intended to be given out by a moderator after repeated use of the strength training machines.

<desc><s>You can't help but notice your muscles are bigger than before.</s> <s>All that hard work you've been putting in has been paying off.</s> <s>You've gained a **permanent +1 in strength**.</s></desc>
Permanent +1 to player speed. Intended to be given out by a moderator after repeated use of the speed training machines.
<desc><s>You can't help but notice there's a spring in your step.</s> <s>All that hard work you've been putting in has been paying off.</s> <s>You've gained a **permanent +1 in speed**.</s></desc>
Permanent +1 to player stamina. Intended to be given out by a moderator after repeated use of the stamina training machines.

<desc><s>You can't help but notice that you can push yourself harder than you were able to before.</s> <s>All that hard work you've been putting in has been paying off.</s> <s>You've gained a **permanent +1 in stamina**.</s></desc>
-1 to strength, -2 to dexterity, speed, and stamina. Player cannot run.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have become **fatigued**!</s> <s>You over-exerted yourself, and now you're low on energy.</s> <s>You feel sluggish.</s></desc>
-1 to speed, -2 to dexterity and stamina, and -3 to strength. Player cannot run.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have become **sore**!</s> <s>You have over-exerted yourself, and now your muscles feel tired.</s></desc>
disable all, enable gesture, enable help, enable inspect, enable inventory, enable monolog, enable narrate, enable status, enable time

Player cannot do anything that would change state. (Moderator's note: This process is shortened to 5 seconds for the purposes of the demo environment. If you would like to use this in a real game, it is recommended that this be changed to 5 minutes.)
disable all, enable gesture, enable help, enable inspect, enable inventory, enable monolog, enable narrate, enable status, enable time

Player cannot do anything that would change state. (Moderator's note: This process is shortened to 30 seconds for the purposes of the demo environment. If you would like to use this in a real game, it is recommended that this be changed to 30 minutes.)
+2 to dexterity. -2 to strength of anyone attacking this player.
<desc><s>You feel your strength grow inside you, you feel like no one can hurt you.</s> <s>You feel **defensive**.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You feel your strength dissipate.</s> <s>After a moment, you feel normal again.</s></desc>
<desc><s>The effect of the caffeine wears off.</s> <s>You feel normal again.</s></desc>
+2 to perception. Inflicted by equipping MAGNIFYING GLASS.
<desc><s>You bust out your handy magnifying glass.</s> <s>You feel like a real **detective**!</s> <s>This will surely help you make more detailed observations.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You put away your magnifying glass.</s> <s>Detective time is over.</s></desc>

Eugh, yuck. This food has a mushy consistency, and it tastes watered down somehow. What a **bland** meal. It was filling, but not satisfying at all. You feel a little sluggish now.

> Tip: This is a status effect. Status effects can do lots of different things, including alter your stats. In this case, your speed stat, which determines how quickly you can move between rooms, was temporarily decreased by 1.
<desc><s>The bad mood you were in from that bland meal earlier wears off.</s></desc>
+1 to speed and stamina. Inflicted as a reward for eating cooked dishes which require considerable effort to prepare.

After eating something so delicious, you feel just a little more **cheerful**! Your body feels good. Cooking really pays off!

> Tip: Nice! This status effect just temporarily increased your speed and stamina stats by 1! Your speed stat determines how quickly you can move between rooms, and your stamina stat determines how long you can move without needing to take a break.
<desc><s>The cheerfulness you were feeling wears off, and you feel normal again.</s></desc>
+2 to speed and stamina. Inflicted as a reward for eating cooked dishes which require tremendous effort to prepare.

What a delicious meal! Your body feels **invigorated**! Putting so much love into a meal like that is extremely rewarding.

> Tip: Nice! This status effect just temporarily increased your speed and stamina stats by 2! Your speed stat determines how quickly you can move between rooms, and your stamina stat determines how long you can move without needing to take a break.
<desc><s>The invigoration in your body after that meal earlier finally wears off, and you start to feel normal again.</s></desc>
<desc><s>Ooh!</s> <s>Aah!</s> <s>That was really **spicy**!</s> <s>Your mouth feels like it's on fire!</s></desc>
<desc><s>Your mouth feels a little better now.</s></desc>

Your breath is now **minty fresh**!

> Tip: This is a status effect. Status effects can do lots of different things, including alter your stats. This status doesn't do anything, though. You can see what status effects you currently have by using the `.status` command.
Various stat debuffs and player cannot move or run. Develops into unconscious when timer hits 0.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You've been injected with a sedative.</s> <s>You are now **sedated**.</s> <s>You feel weak and tired.</s> <s>You can't walk, and you will soon fall unconscious.</s></desc>
Various stat debuffs and player cannot run. Player will die when timer hits 0.
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You've been **lethally injected**.</s> <s>Your muscles seize up and moving becomes difficult.</s> <s>You only have a few more minutes to live.</s></desc>
disable all, enable help, enable status, enable time, enable monolog, enable gesture
Same effect as restricted but develops into partially paralyzed when timer hits 0. Develops into lethally injected when duplicated.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have been **paralyzed**!</s> <s>You are completely immobilized.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You start to regain control of your body again.</s> <s>You are still **partially paralyzed**, but you can move around a little bit.</s></desc>
-5 to dexterity, speed, and stamina. Player cannot run.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You have been **partially paralyzed**!</s> <s>Your movement has been drastically reduced!</s></desc>
<desc><s>You regain full control over your body.</s></desc>
Develops into sick when timer hits 0.
-2 to all stats except perception. Player will throw up when timer hits 0, but this will not be narrated in the room or have any tangible effect.
<desc type="WARNING"><s>You start to feel **sick**.</s> <s>Your stomach is twisting and turning, and you feel like you might throw up soon.</s></desc>
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You suddenly throw up!</s> <s>After a minute, your stomach starts to feel better.</s></desc>
Develops into feculent when timer hits 0.
No effect. Player will involuntarily defecate when timer hits 0, but this will not be narrated in the room or have any tangible effect.

<desc type="ALERT"><s>Your stomach begins to churn as you feel something quickly working its way down.</s> <s>You have become **feculent**!</s> <s>You *desperately* need to get to the restroom, *immediately!*</s></desc>
<desc type="ALERT"><s>You let it all out!</s> <s>This would be really embarrassing if you aren't in the bathroom right now!</s></desc>
<desc><s>You begin to feel incredibly focused!</s> <s>You have become **sharp**!</s></desc>
<desc><s>You put on the nightvision goggles.</s> <s>You can now see even in the dark.</s></desc>
Every time player speaks, their message will be sent to the room of any other player with this status.

<desc><s>With your device turned on, you are now **transmitting** your voice.</s> <s>When you speak, your voice will be audible in the rooms of everyone on the line.</s> <s>When they speak, you will also hear it.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You turn off your device.</s> <s>You can no longer send or receive transmissions.</s></desc>
Allows the player to send and receive text messages.
<desc><s>With your device turned on, you are **connected**.</s> <s>You can now use the `.text` command.</s></desc>
<desc><s>You turn off your device.</s> <s>You can no longer send or receive texts.</s></desc>
rare hallucination 0, rare hallucination 1, rare hallucination 2, rare hallucination 3

Rare hallucination loop begins when timer hits 0. Inflicted by using PALIPERIDONE TABLET.

Used to simplify descriptions that apply to transmasc characters. Prevents player from being inflicted with transfem HRT cycle.
Player is taking their HRT. Develops into transfem neutral when timer hits 0.
Player's HRT is wearing off. Develops into transfem dysphoric when timer hits 0.

disable all, no speech, no channel, hidden, no hearing, no sight, unconscious

Player cannot do anything because they have not spawned in yet. This is useful for keeping players loaded without them being able to interact with the game. However, they will still receive notifications for any other status effects they have.
Player cannot do anything. Intended to be inflicted on all players simultaneously to notify them that bot needs to be restarted.
